# clawvisor_sso_connection (Resource)

A per-org single sign-on connection (SAML or OIDC) — e.g. an Okta app. This is a **Clawvisor Cloud / enterprise** resource: it requires the `sso` capability, so it errors on an OSS-only deployment, and requires the provider's `org_id` to be set. It is a singleton — one connection per org (the resource id is the org id).

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "clawvisor" {
  endpoint  = "https://clawvisor.example.com:8443"
  api_token = var.clawvisor_api_token # sensitive
  org_id    = "org_abc123"
}

# Okta via OIDC (the fastest hookup):
resource "clawvisor_sso_connection" "okta" {
  kind               = "oidc"
  email_domain       = "acme.com"
  oidc_issuer        = "https://acme.okta.com"
  oidc_client_id     = var.okta_client_id
  oidc_client_secret = var.okta_client_secret # sensitive; encrypted server-side, never returned
  jit_provision      = true
  default_role       = "member" # "owner" is not allowed
  sso_team_attribute = "groups"
  enabled            = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email_domain` (String) The IdP's verified email domain (e.g. `acme.com`) used to route sign-ins to this connection.
- `kind` (String) `oidc` or `saml`. Determines which of the `oidc_*` / `saml_*` attributes are required.

### Optional

- `default_role` (String) Role granted to JIT-provisioned users: `member` (default) or `admin`. `owner` is rejected.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the connection is active. Defaults to `true`.
- `jit_provision` (Boolean) Just-in-time provision users on first SSO sign-in. Defaults to `false`.
- `oidc_client_id` (String) OIDC client id. Required when `kind = "oidc"`.
- `oidc_client_secret` (String, Sensitive) OIDC client secret. Required when `kind = "oidc"`. Write-only: the value transits Terraform state (use an encrypted state backend / write-only inputs), the server stores it encrypted and never returns it, so it stays authoritative from configuration and is not refreshed on read.
- `oidc_issuer` (String) OIDC issuer URL (e.g. `https://acme.okta.com`). Required when `kind = "oidc"`.
- `saml_certificate_pem` (String) SAML IdP signing certificate, PEM-encoded. Required when `kind = "saml"`.
- `saml_entity_id` (String) SAML IdP entity id. Required when `kind = "saml"`.
- `saml_sso_url` (String) SAML IdP SSO (redirect) URL. Required when `kind = "saml"`.
- `sso_team_attribute` (String) SAML/OIDC assertion attribute mapped to team membership (e.g. `groups`). Optional.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The org id this connection belongs to (matches the provider's `org_id`).

## Import

Import is supported using the org id:

```shell
terraform import clawvisor_sso_connection.okta org_abc123
```
